requirements.intent: User-set passwords are at least 12 characters in length.
Logout and session expiration invalidate the session token.
The application enforces access-control rules at a trusted service layer, not only in client-side code.
The application does not log credentials, session tokens, or payment details.
Sensitive data is not sent in URL query strings; it is carried in the request body or headers.
Every HTTP response sets a Content-Type header with a safe, explicit character set.
